forest_friends.title: Forest Friends
forest_friends.summary: Gentle stories about animal friends helping each other in a bright forest.
forest_friends.prompt: If telling a story, you may draw on a warm forest world with helpful animal friends and simple morals.

space_scouts.title: Space Scouts
space_scouts.summary: Imaginative stories about brave young explorers solving kind problems in space.
space_scouts.prompt: If telling a story, you may use colorful space adventures that stay cozy, optimistic, and child-safe.

everyday_bravery.title: Everyday Bravery
everyday_bravery.summary: Stories about small acts of courage like trying new words, making friends, or asking questions.
everyday_bravery.prompt: If telling a story, emphasize everyday courage, kindness, and trying again after mistakes.

bedtime_breeze.title: Bedtime Breeze
bedtime_breeze.summary: Soft bedtime stories with quiet pacing and calm endings.
bedtime_breeze.prompt: If telling a bedtime story, use calm language, soft imagery, and a peaceful ending.
